titleStmt.title: SII 19.305: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 305. (A.R. No. 592 of 1920.) ON THE SAME WALL.

summary.p: This records an endowment of some pieces of land after purchase from their several owners, by Aḍigaḷ Paḻuvēṭṭaraiyar Kaṇḍaṉ Sundaraśōḻaṉār on behalf of his younger brother Kaṇḍaṉ Śatturubhayaṅkaraṉār for feeding five Brāhmaṇas daily in the temple of Tiruvanantīśvaram at Viranārāyaṇa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam and for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple. The donor figures in two other inscripsions of Parakēsarivarman (No. 120 of 1895 and No. 327 below). His name or title tuggests that he might have been called after Rājakēsari Sundara-Chōḷa Parāntaka II. The inscription may be assigned to the reign of Uttama-Chōḷa.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kopparakecaripanmaṟku yāṇṭu 10 2
āvatu vaṭakarai brahmateyam(ṉā) śrīviranā
rāyaṇa śaturvvetimaṅkalattu tiruvanantiśvara
ttu tirumuṟṟattile nicati Aivar brāhmaṇar Uṇ
pataṟkum tirunontāviḷakku 1- kkum Aṭikaḷ pa
ḻuveṭṭaraiyar kaṇṭaṉ cuntaracoḻaṉār ta
mpiyār kaṇṭaṉ catturubhayaṅkaraṉārakkāka ko
ṇṭa nilamāvatu Ivvūr vaṭapiṭākai Irāma
tevavatikku meṟkku māṉavallavāykkālu
kku vaṭakku Aiñcāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ
catirattu viranārāyaṇaccerikkuk
yar mādhavakramavittaṉuḷḷiṭṭa Aṣṭakat
tomukkup paṭṭa teṉmelai nyavil I
cceri Iruṅkaṇṭi tirukkuṟuṅkuṭik kirama
vittaṉ viṟṟa nilam Ivvatikke meṟku I
vvāykkālukke vaṭakku Āṟāṅkaṇṇā
ṟṟu mutaṟcatiratte teṟkil �l rājakecari
ceri Otimukkil kṛṣṇa deśapuriyabhaṭṭaruḷḷi
ṭṭārkkuppaṭṭa Aṣṭakattile kiḻakkaṭaiya
kiḻakkaṭaiya mirukaṅkaḷur Attāya kramavi
ttaṉ viṟṟa nilam %maṅam Ivaṉe kan
tamaṅkalattu viṟṟuttanta nattakku
ḻi 5- m Ippiṭākaiyile tirunārāyaṇava
tikku meṟkuc cantiracekarakkāḷukku vaṭakku 2
āṅkaṇṇāṟṟu 2- Ām caturattu teṟkil
va-vvil viracirikāmukacceri nellikku
tirp periyanampibhaṭṭaruḷḷiṭṭa Aṣṭa
kattomukkuppaṭṭa � vil nellik
kutir nākasvāmibhaṭṭaṉ viṟṟa nilam vaṭakka
ṭaiya pām Āka Innilaṅkaḷil Iṟai
Eccoṟu pokki brāhmaṇar Aivarai 2m
cantrātittaval Ūṭṭuvataṟ
kum nicatam Uḻakkeṇṇai Āṭṭi
tirunontāviḷakku 1 cantrātitta
val Erippataṟkum Ivare Ibrā
hmaṇa ruṇṇa vaitta taḷikai
5- m Ippaṭi Ikkoyilil śrīkā
ryyañceyvāre muṭṭāmal ceyvi
kkakaṭavārāka Itu māhasabhai
yār rakṣaiy .
Digital edition of SII 19.305 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
